import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Edit Testset Variant"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/testsets/variants/{testset_variant_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update metadata on a testset variant.

Variants hold only branch-level metadata (name, description, slug,
flags, tags, meta). Testcase content belongs to revisions.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
